name: sourceType
label: Source
help: Where the document content comes from.

nested.name: url
nested.label: URL
nested.help: The URL of the page to render.

nested.name: html
nested.label: HTML
nested.help: Inline HTML to render. Use self-contained markup; external scripts loaded from a CDN can hang the converter.

nested.name: templateId
nested.label: Template ID
nested.help: ID of a saved template from the PolyDoc dashboard.

nested.name: templateData
nested.label: Template Data (JSON)
nested.help: JSON object of variables passed to the Liquid template renderer.

name: format
label: Page Format
help: Paper size for the PDF. For A0 to A6 or a custom size, use Advanced (JSON).

name: pageRanges
label: Page Ranges
help: Pages to include, e.g. 1-5, 8. Empty means all pages.

name: outline
label: Outline (Bookmarks)
help: Generate PDF bookmarks from HTML headings (h1 to h6).

name: marginTop
label: Margin Top
help: Top margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm.

name: marginRight
label: Margin Right
help: Right margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm.

name: marginBottom
label: Margin Bottom
help: Bottom margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm.

name: marginLeft
label: Margin Left
help: Left margin with optional unit, e.g. 10mm.

name: delivery
label: Delivery
help: How the generated file is returned.

nested.name: presignedUrl
nested.label: Presigned URL
nested.help: HTTP PUT presigned URL from your storage provider (S3 / GCS / Azure).

nested.name: webhookUrl
nested.label: Webhook URL
nested.help: URL the generated file is delivered to.

nested.name: webhookOptions
nested.label: Webhook Options (JSON)
nested.help: Extra webhook settings merged with the URL: async, method, headers, retries, retryDelay, timeout.

name: tag
label: Tag
help: Label for logging and analytics (max 30 chars).

name: advanced
label: Advanced (JSON)
help: Raw fields deep-merged into the request body for any API option not exposed above, e.g. pdf.watermark, pdf.pdfa, pdf.encryption, render, request.
